case_title: JOE WU VS. KATELYN ANNE BRADY

docket_entries.description: SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST JOE WU FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUN-14-2016, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-01-2016. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
